notes:
đậm = strong, bold, intense. It describes something that has a lot of color, flavor, smell, or emotional strength.

As an adjective, it often goes with colors, tastes, smells, makeup, patterns, or feelings. It can also describe thick or concentrated liquids and mixtures.

Opposite: nhạt (light, bland, weak) — great pair to remember.  
You’ll also see đậm đặc for “very thick / highly concentrated.”
exampleSentences: Anh thích uống cà phê pha thật đậm vào buổi sáng.
Chị chọn màu son đậm cho buổi tiệc tối nay.
Bức tranh này sử dụng các đường nét rất đậm và rõ ràng.

content.sentence: Màu sắc của bức tranh rất ___.

translation.en: The colors of the painting are very bold.

example.en: This dish has a rich flavor.
example.es: Este plato tiene un sabor intenso.
example.vi: Món ăn này có vị đậm đà.

definitions.en: Having a strong or rich flavor or color.
definitions.es: Tener un sabor o color fuerte o intenso.
definitions.vi: Có vị hoặc màu sắc mạnh mẽ, đậm đà.

content.sentence: Màu này rất ___ và nổi bật.

translation.en: This color is very bold and striking.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I like to drink bold coffee in the morning.
She chose a bold lipstick color for the party tonight.
This painting uses very bold and clear lines.

As an adjective, it often goes with colors, tastes, smells, makeup, patterns, or feelings. It can also describe thick or concentrated liquids and mixtures.

Opposite: **nhạt** (light, bland, weak) — great pair to remember.  
You’ll also see **đậm đặc** for “very thick / highly concentrated.”
